description_long: This is a whole lemon with a vibrant yellow peel, featuring a slightly oval shape and a textured, dimpled surface typical of citrus fruits. One end of the lemon is cut, exposing the pale, fibrous interior and several visible seeds embedded in the white pith. The cut surface displays a moist, slightly glossy appearance, contrasting with the matte, pebbled exterior. The peel appears mostly intact with a few minor blemishes and a small mark visible on one side. The lemon's size and form suggest it is fresh and of average size for its type. No stickers, labels, or other markings are present on the surface.
description: A whole, oval yellow lemon with a textured peel and one end cut to reveal the pale, seeded interior.
description_view_0: Shows the rounded yellow peel with a small blemish and a partial view of the cut end.
description_view_1: Displays the cut end prominently, revealing seeds and the white pith, with the yellow peel receding around the edge.
description_view_2: Highlights the smooth, unbroken yellow peel with the cut end just visible at the edge.
description_view_3: Focuses on the cut end with three visible seeds and the fibrous interior, surrounded by the yellow peel.
attribute_peel_condition: The peel is mostly smooth and intact with a dimpled texture and a small blemish visible on one side.
